svg.content: <mxGraphModel adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/> <mxCell id="m_t" value="実行モード" style="text;html=1;fontStyle=1;align=left;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="30" width="200" height="20" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="m1" value="Replay (既定)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="60" width="160" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="m2" value="Manual (LiveManual)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="150" width="160" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="m3" value="Auto (LiveAuto)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="240" width="160" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="me1" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;startArrow=classic;startFill=1;" edge="1" source="m1" target="m2" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="me2" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;startArrow=classic;startFill=1;" edge="1" source="m2" target="m3" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="v_t" value="venue 状態遷移" style="text;html=1;fontStyle=1;align=left;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="320" y="30" width="200" height="20" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="v1" value="DISCONNECTED" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="320" y="60" width="160" height="50" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="v2" value="AUTHENTICATING" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="320" y="150" width="160" height="50" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="v3" value="CONNECTED" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="320" y="240" width="160" height="50" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="v4" value="SUBSCRIBED" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="320" y="330" width="160" height="50" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="v5" value="RECONNECTING" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;dashed=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="560" y="240" width="160" height="50" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="ve1" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" edge="1" source="v1" target="v2" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="ve2" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" edge="1" source="v2" target="v3" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> value="切断" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;" edge="1" source="v4" target="v5" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="ve5" value="再接続" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;" edge="1" source="v5" target="v2" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel>
